home.heroTagline: Delicious food, drink and cocktail recipes. Decide what to cook faster — with recipes that actually work.
home.aiBannerTitle: List what's in your pantry, get a recipe
home.aiBannerDescription: Tell us what you have — we'll show the best-matching recipes and what's missing.
home.ctaDescription: Sign up, add your take on favourite recipes, and share with the community.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to Tarifle and join the community.
login.passwordResetOk: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with the new password.

errors.oauthNotLinked: This email is already registered with a password. For now, please sign in with your password; Google account linking will be added to settings soon.
errors.configuration: Server configuration error. Please try again later.
errors.default: Something went wrong while signing in. Please try again.

register.title: Sign Up
register.subtitle: Create a free account and contribute recipes.
register.consent: I have read and accept the <kvkk>KVKK Privacy Notice</kvkk> and <terms>Terms of Use</terms>.

errors.signInAfter: Account created but sign-in failed. Please sign in from the login page.

forgotPassword.pageSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a single-use reset link.
forgotPassword.emailHelper: We'll send a reset link to the email registered on your account.
forgotPassword.sentBody: We sent an email to <email>{email}</email>. The link is valid for 1 hour. If you don't see it, check your spam or junk folder.
forgotPassword.sentHint: Still no email? The address may not be registered here, or your account may be linked to Google — try "Sign in with Google" from the login page.

resetPassword.subtitleValid: Your link is active. Set your new password below.
resetPassword.subtitleInvalid: This link is no longer valid — you can request a new one below.
resetPassword.invalidExpired: Your reset link has expired. Request a new one and use it within 1 hour.
resetPassword.invalidOther: This link is invalid. It may have been used already or copied incorrectly.
resetPassword.doneBody: You can now sign in with your new password. Redirecting to the sign-in page…

verifyEmail.successBody: <email>{email}</email> is now linked to your account. The "Verified user" badge will show on your profile.
verifyEmail.failExpired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one from your profile.
verifyEmail.failOther: This verification link is invalid. It may have been used already or copied incorrectly.

site.description: A modern recipe platform serving clean, community-contributed food, drink and cocktail recipes.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: List the ingredients you have and we'll surface the best-matching recipes. You'll also see what's missing.

shoppingList.title: My Shopping List
shoppingList.description: Bookmarked recipe ingredients and items you add manually, all in one list.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Track adaptation likes, moderation decisions and badge notifications here.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to your Tarifle account.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Random recipes, popular searches and cuisine discoveries.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Reset your Tarifle account password by email.

legal.privacyDescription: Information on how Tarifle processes personal data.
legal.kvkkDescription: KVKK (Turkish Data Protection Law) privacy notice.

verification.subject: Verify your Tarifle account
verification.title: Verify your account
verification.body: Click the button below to verify your Tarifle account. This link is valid for {hours} hours.
verification.fallbackHint: If the button doesn't work, paste this link into your browser:
verification.footer: If you didn't request this email, ignore it — no one can access your account.
verification.textBody: Click the link below to verify your Tarifle account:
verification.textExpiry: This link is valid for {hours} hours.
verification.textFooter: If you didn't request this email, ignore it — no one can access your account.

passwordReset.subject: Tarifle password reset
passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: Click the button below to reset your Tarifle account password. This link is valid for {hours} hour(s).
passwordReset.fallbackHint: If the button doesn't work, paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request this email, ignore it — your password stays the same. If something looks suspicious, check your account at tarifle.app/ayarlar.
passwordReset.textBody: Click the link below to reset your Tarifle account password:
passwordReset.textExpiry: This link is valid for {hours} hour(s).
passwordReset.textFooter: If you didn't request this email, ignore it — your password stays the same.

oauthOnlyReset.subject: Tarifle — this account is linked to Google
oauthOnlyReset.title: This account is linked to Google
oauthOnlyReset.body: We received a password reset request for {email} on Tarifle. This account is linked to Google and has no password sign-in.
oauthOnlyReset.hint: If you'd like to add password sign-in too, go to Settings after signing in and use the "Add password" option.
oauthOnlyReset.footer: If you didn't request this email, ignore it — your account stays the same.
oauthOnlyReset.textBody: We received a password reset request for {email} on Tarifle.
oauthOnlyReset.textBody2: This account is linked to Google and has no password sign-in.
oauthOnlyReset.textBody3: To sign in, use the Sign in with Google button:
oauthOnlyReset.textHint1: If you want to add password sign-in too, after signing in with Google
oauthOnlyReset.textHint2: go to the settings page and use the 'Add password' flow.
oauthOnlyReset.textFooter: If you didn't request this email, ignore it — your account stays the same.

dashboard.growthAria: Last 30 days of daily new users — total {total}
dashboard.batchesEmpty: No batches yet (shows once 5+ recipes INSERT in the same hour).
dashboard.batchesFooter: Hourly buckets — appears when 5+ recipes INSERT in the same hour.

allergen.titleShow: Click to stop hiding recipes with {label}

settings.pageSubtitle: Update your name, username, and bio here. Your username appears in your profile URL.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the interface language. Changes apply instantly; recipe content will also appear in your selected language (where an English translation exists).

profile.emailHelper: You can't change your email here.
profile.usernameHelper: Lowercase letters, digits, _ and - only. Must start with a letter.
profile.usernameChangeWarning: If you change it, your profile link becomes brand new.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little about yourself — favourite recipes, cooking style, etc.

google.title: Google account
google.descriptionLinked: Your account is linked to this Google identity: {email}. Next time you sign in, choose "Sign in with Google" and you won't need a password.
google.descriptionUnlinked: Link your Google account so you can sign in with one click. Only a Google account that matches your sign-up email can be linked.
google.confirmUnlink: Are you sure you want to unlink your Google account? After this you'll only be able to sign in with email + password.
google.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
google.startError: Couldn't start the linking flow. Please try again.
google.linkSuccessBanner: Your Google account has been linked successfully.
google.mismatchBanner: The Google account you chose isn't registered as <email>{email}</email>. To link your account you need to choose the Google identity with the same email.
google.sessionBanner: The linking request expired. Please try again.
google.unlinkSuccessBanner: Your Google account has been unlinked.
google.needPasswordHint: To unlink your Google account you first need to add a password — you can add one from the Password card below.

password.title: Password
password.descriptionChange: For your security, change your password from time to time.
password.descriptionSet: Your account was created via Google. Add a password so you can also sign in with email + password.
password.newPasswordHelper: At least 8 characters. Pick something not easy to guess.

delete.title: Danger zone
delete.description: You can permanently delete your account. This action can't be undone. Your adaptations, collections, likes and notifications will be removed.
delete.confirmDialog: Your account will be permanently deleted. All your adaptations, collections, likes and notifications will be removed. This action can't be undone — do you want to continue?
delete.confirmHelper: To continue, type your username exactly:
delete.passwordHelper: For security, we need to verify your current password.

footer.brandTagline: A modern recipe platform serving clean food, drink, and cocktail recipes with community contributions.

profile.collectionsEmptyOwner: You haven't created any collections yet. Open a recipe and start with the 'Collection' button.
profile.reviewsEmptyOwner: You haven't reviewed any recipe yet.
profile.bookmarksEmpty: You haven't saved any recipes yet.

collection.empty: This collection has no recipes yet.

notifications.emptyAll: You have no notifications yet. New activity will appear here.

discover.subtitle: Find new flavors, get inspired.
discover.aiCtaTitle: What can you make with what you have?
discover.aiCtaSubtitle: List your ingredients and we'll find the best-matching recipes →

aiAssistant.pageTitle: Find a recipe from what you have
aiAssistant.pageSubtitle: List the ingredients in your pantry and we'll bring you the best-matching recipes. You'll also see what's missing — so you know what you can cook without going to the store.

form.ingredientsHelper: Press comma or Enter to add each ingredient separately.
form.ingredientsPlaceholderEmpty: e.g. tomato, onion, egg (add with comma or Enter)
form.pantryLabel: I always have salt, pepper, water and oil
form.pantryHelper: These pantry staples will be included in the match.

result.emptyTitle: No matches. Try fewer filters or add another ingredient.

shoppingList.headerSubtitle: Add via the Add to list button on recipe pages, manage here.
shoppingList.empty: List is empty. Open a recipe and add ingredients.

save.shoppingTitleAttr: {count} ingredients will be added to your shopping list
save.collectionsEmpty: You don't have any collections yet.

toast.shoppingAlreadyAll: All ingredients are already on the list.
toast.shoppingAdded: {added} ingredients added to your shopping list.
toast.shoppingAddedWithMerged: {added} ingredients added to your shopping list ({merged} already existed).
toast.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.

deleteVariation.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the "{title}" adaptation? This cannot be undone.

ageGate.title: Age Verification
ageGate.description: This recipe contains alcohol. To view the content, please confirm you are over 18.

similarRecipes.title: Similar recipes
similarRecipes.subtitle: Selected from the same category and tags

variations.loginCta: Sign in to add an adaptation
variations.successPending: Your adaptation has been received and will be reviewed by our team. Once approved, it will be added to the recipe and you'll be notified.

form.title: Add Adaptation
form.ingredientsHelp: Enter quantity, unit and name in separate fields for each ingredient. If no unit is needed, leave "— unit —" selected.
form.stepsPlaceholder:
Cut the eggplants lengthwise in half
Scoop out the inside with a spoon
Bake at 180°C for 20 min

card.hidePromptLabel: Optional: note the hide reason (notified to author).

reviews.empty: No reviews yet — leave the first star.

form.commentPlaceholder: What did you love, what would you change?
form.errorRatingRange: Please pick a star between 1 and 5.
form.errorNetwork: Could not submit your review. Please try again.
form.pendingNotice: Your review is in moderation; it will be published once approved.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your review?

recipe.aiCrossLink: What else can I make with these ingredients?
recipe.allergenDisclaimer: If you have allergies, double-check the ingredient list yourself.
recipe.variationsEmpty: No adaptations yet. Be the first to add one!

empty.title: No recipes found
